text: I feel curious and a bit disoriented in this environment. The first image portrays an austere, empty corridor—sterile, almost like an in-between space that resists identity, filled with anticipation and a strange sense of emptiness. The second image shifts as I move into a vibrant, intellectual setting. I’m energised by the display of ideas and the celebration of research and innovation. Here, there's a palpable sense of possibility and human creativity, a reminder that even the most sterile of spaces can open into realms of imagination and progress. The contrast between these scenes makes me reflect on how the spaces we inhabit shape not only our actions but also our thoughts and feelings.
